line_1: Then Mortals try'd the shelving Hull to slope,
line_2: To raise the Mast, and twist the stronger Rope,

line_1: The hedge-rows shall ring loud, and on the slope
line_2: As with the songs of joyance and of hope

line_1: And gently smooth life's downward slope!
line_2: Though age untimely chill gay hope;

line_1: That, oh! poor friend, might to life's downward slope
line_2: Thoughts dark and drooping! 'Twas the voice of Hope.
Sweet child, last relic of our hope,
